headline: McCormick (MKC) Says Unilever Foods Deal Planning Is Advancing And EPS Could Benefit
summary: McCormick (NYSE:MKC) reported significant progress on its proposed combination with Unilever Foods, with management highlighting major advancements in integration planning. The company expects the deal to provide substantial EPS accretion and support long-term value creation once completed. Updates on the transaction come alongside strong Q2 earnings and continued acquisition activity, drawing close attention from shareholders. The cross-border deal remains under market scrutiny,...
